title: How Much Does Roof Replacement Cost in Lexington, KY?
description: A Lexington homeowner guide to roof replacement cost factors, asphalt shingle choices, permits, decking, ventilation, and when repair may still make sense.

title: What to Do When Your Roof Leaks After a Lexington Storm
description: A practical Lexington homeowner guide for roof leaks after wind or rain, including what to check safely, when to call, and what roofers look for.
